one_line: Wrote a headless 200-DPI matplotlib generator (make_figures.py) and ran it to produce 6 publication-quality PNGs from REAL result JSONs (A1 glm-5p2 126ep/cond, A2 deepseek 750ep+McNemar, frontier 5-model, learned-harness v2): pass@1 CIs, by-family bars, pass@k curve, McNemar paired test (p<1e-4), frontier lift, harness generalization; all numbers spot-checked vs source, honest negatives drawn not hidden, no shared core file touched
